title: Slack workflow integration
excerpt: Slack is rolling out a new Workflow builder. Can the Monday app for Slack allow Monday to be, what they call, a “connector step” in this new Slack Workflow builder? https://slack.com/help/articles/15363357403411-Introduc…

posts.author: michael_adams1 (Michael Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Slack is rolling out a new Workflow builder. Can the Monday app for Slack allow Monday to be, what they call, a “connector step” in this new Slack Workflow builder? https://slack.com/help/articles/15363357403411-Introducing-new-Slack-platform-features-and-pricing

An example use case would be something like:
When a Slack workflow form is submitted, create a Monday item. This could be applicable to multiple departments but our IT department could really use it.

This way we can give our Slack users an easy, streamline way of submitting a request… and that request can send multiple notices inside Slack and then create a Monday item for our team to work on.

posts.author: jhamiter (Johnathan Hamiter)
posts.cookedHtml: Commenting to raise visibility as I’m looking for a solution for this myself. Would like to be able to raise requests in Slack using workflows/forms and use user inputs to create an item and kick off processes in monday (similar to Halp > JIRA)

posts.author: SpaceCowboy (Yoni Toubul)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also looking for this kind of integration…

posts.author: Rio (Rio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes please! Would be very useful.

*Not sure if related, but I would pay money to be able to have a Slack workflow/bot/etc to search in Monday, find a document or board, and return the link into the Slack message. That would save us hours per day…

posts.author: Alastair (Alastair Wilkinson)
posts.cookedHtml: It is actually Slack that is building connector steps for the Workflow Builder 2.0 and currently they are not opening up their platform to 3rd party developers. I do know that Slack intends on builder further connector steps but no idea on prioritization or time lines.

posts.author: jparty (Javier Party)
posts.cookedHtml:
Today, I see Monday in the dropdown list of connections that one can add to Slack’s workflow builder.

I click on it.

I click on create an item.

image758×420 19.5 KB

I click on connect.

Screenshot 2024-05-03 0834111135×693 30.8 KB

I click on continue to monday.

This is what I get.

posts.author: thomasf (Thomas Flechet)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m getting the same error message. Did you figure out a solution?

posts.author: kyrylo.a (Kyrylo)
posts.cookedHtml: I found a solution: you need to install “Slack Connector for Monday” app in Monday to be able to use these workflow items.

posts.author: rfontdevila (Roger)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m running into this very issue, but I cannot find a “Slack Connector for Monday” on Monday’s marketplace. Any ideas on how to find this app, or how to resolve this issue? It would be REALLY helpful to be able to get the output of a Slack workflow/from into a Monday board.
